title: Retinted: River Redux Waters
description: Retints Waters of River Redux biomes. (REQUIRES POLYTONE MOD) Part of the Retinted resource packs series.
body:
Recolors River Redux biome water to be a softer blue. Part of the Retinted: Waters series.

Check out the Gallery for pictures.

This Resource Pack Requires the Polytone mod to work!
Polytone is a mod that allows resource pack creators to edit more things than usual, like water colors. I have also heard that Optifine works but I have not tested it.
